metadata.site_description: 每天更新AI科技新闻日报

AI模型发布.title: OpenAI - LinkedIn
AI模型发布.content: OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company dedicated to ensuring that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity.

AI模型发布.title: What Is OpenAI? Everything You Need to Know - Coursera
AI模型发布.content: OpenAI is an AI research company that offers a range of services, including ChatGPT, to develop AI in ways that they say benefit humanity. * You can use OpenAI’s AI models to save time and money by automating tasks, as well as gain insights into your data through predictive analytics. Its first offering was an open-source toolkit for developing reinforcement learning algorithms (OpenAI Gym), which prompted it to focus on AI research for more general purposes. In 2018, OpenAI released the concept of a generative pre-trained transformer (GPT), which is a neural network (a machine learning model) that simulates the human brain and is trained on data sets. Learn how to programmatically prompt an OpenAI model using the OpenAI API and use the AI to add to a data set on a user's movie collection. OpenAI products such as ChatGPT, when used correctly, can help us in our daily professional lives to perform certain AI-driven tasks with accuracy and efficiency.

AI模型发布.title: What is OpenAI? Definition and History from TechTarget
AI模型发布.content: In March 2019, OpenAI shifted from nonprofit to capped-profit status and became formally known as OpenAI LP, controlled by parent company OpenAI Inc. Almost two years later, in January 2021, OpenAI introduced Dall-E, a generative AI model that analyzes natural language text from human users and then generates images based on what is described in the text. OpenAI will provide the Defense Department with AI tools and models. * **Open AI o3-pro.** In June 2025, OpenAI announced o3-pro, a model with the highest level of performance in the o-series at the time of release. The New York Times also sued OpenAI and Microsoft in December 2023 for copyright infringement, accusing them of illegally copying articles to train LLMs and create AI products that compete with The New York Times. The paper was the first major news organization to sue OpenAI and Microsoft for using their publications to train AI systems.

创业公司.title: Six Types of AI Startups, Explained - MIT Sloan Management Review
创业公司.content: ## If you’re a startup founder, investor, or customer, a new typology can give you context for making strategic decisions based on how the company is harnessing AI. Use this framework to categorize six types of AI startups: originators, explorers, infrastructure builders, enhancers, optimizers, and experimenters. As generative AI has transitioned from novelty to necessity for many businesses, both established companies and startups are racing to decipher AI trends and figure out how best to use the technology. A strategic question remains underexplored: What type of AI company is being built by these startups? Startups like Scale AI (data labeling), Pinecone (vector databases), and Weights & Biases (machine learning experiment tracking) are building the data, APIs, and developer frameworks that power today’s generative AI applications. Corporate customers seeking to buy AI capabilities from startups should match their organization’s needs and expectations to company type. Whether you’re building, backing, or buying AI capabilities, knowing the type of startup and where the company is heading has never mattered more.

研究论文.title: ScholarAI | AI Research Assistant for Students, Developers ...
研究论文.content: # **Your AI-Powered Research Assistant**. A logo featuring a large letter 'S' with a pine tree silhouette in the center, all in gray and white. Quickly understand and summarize your research papers and search for new research with our AI chat assistant. Jenni consults the latest research and your PDF uploads. Bring your research papers to life with source-based generation and collection-level control. Jenni is an AI writing workspace for researchers and students. You can upload sources, chat with your papers, manage citations automatically, and generate drafts grounded in real research. ScholarAI’s paper-search tools now power Jenni’s research experience. Jenni is designed specifically for research and academic writing. It connects directly to real papers, manages citations automatically, and accelerates your writing process with AI autocomplete and chat. Jenni offers a free plan to explore its research and writing features, plus a premium plan with unlimited words, document uploads, and access to advanced AI features.

政策法规.title: Ensuring a National Policy Framework for Artificial ...
政策法规.content: Within 90 days of the date of this order, the Secretary of Commerce, consistent with the Secretary’s authorities under 47 U.S.C. 902(b), shall, in consultation with the Special Advisor for AI and Crypto, the Assistant to the President for Economic Policy, the Assistant to the President for Science and Technology, and the Assistant to the President and Counsel to the President, publish an evaluation of existing State AI laws that identifies onerous laws that conflict with the policy set forth in section 2 of this order, as well as laws that should be referred to the Task Force established pursuant to section 3 of this order. (a)  The Special Advisor for AI and Crypto and the Assistant to the President for Science and Technology shall jointly prepare a legislative recommendation establishing a uniform Federal policy framework for AI that preempts State AI laws that conflict with the policy set forth in this order.

政策法规.title: Regulating Artificial Intelligence: U.S. and International ...
政策法规.content: No federal legislation establishing broad regulatory authorities for the development or use of AI or prohibitions on AI has been enacted.

行业趋势.title: 7 rapid AI trends happening in 2025 - Khoros
行业趋势.content: Artificial Intelligence (AI) I is no longer on the horizon — it’s here, rapidly transforming how brands interact with customers, build communities, and manage operations. Below, we break down the top AI trends shaping the future of customer experience and brand engagement along with practical insights to help you navigate what’s next. In the real world, multimodal AI capabilities can help handle diverse types of data in fields like financial services, customer analytics, and marketing. This means that multimodal generative AI can process and derive insights from diverse data types, enabling businesses to make informed decisions, enhance customer experiences, and optimize operations. AI has come a long way, from helping companies moderate their online communities, protecting their brand and executing social media posts, to utilizing AI-trained chatbots and supporting customer service agents. Whether you have or want to build an online community, manage your social media, or enhance your customer service, Khoros has AI-powered solutions for next-level efficiency.

行业趋势.content: Some of the most common include AI-generated yearbook photos, professional headshots, cartoon versions of pets, and historical-style portraits.
